text.title: SQL Optimization Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Orders list slow query optimisation
example.note: query_id=slow_orders_list_v3. Baseline: Seq Scan on orders (estimated=10000 actual=1500000), 8200ms over sample=50. Investigation: ANALYZE orders; estimate corrected. Change: index_added ix_orders_(tenant_id, created_at DESC, id). After: Index Scan, actual_rows=100, 200ms. wall_clock_delta_ms=-8000. Sample=50. PR shipped with report; APM confirmed p95 drop from 8.5s to 0.22s.

example.title: Index-by-vibes rebuild
example.note: Engineer added 6 indexes 'just in case'. EXPLAIN never captured; pg_stat showed only one of them used. Tree caught: explain-before-change → drop 5 unused indexes after collecting EXPLAINs.
